original_statement: how many other games had the same result as the colchester united game that ended 2-0?
mutated_statement: how many other somethings had the same result as the something that ended that way?
mutation_analysis: [Entity generalization + Delexicalization + Quantitative vagueness]: specific team/event "colchester united game" replaced by generic "something" | item class "games" → "somethings" | exact score "2-0" → vague "that way" (colchester united game → something that ended that way; games → somethings; ended 2-0 → ended that way)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought和simple_query的内容可识别出关键证据：agent在simple_query和judge_thought中都写到“the phrase ‘ended that way’ most plausibly refers to a match that ended 0–0/0–0 result”，明确承认了指代不明并作出假设。具体表现为：虽指出模糊性（使用了“most plausibly”之类表述），但未向用户求证或请求澄清，直接基于该假设检索表格并给出具体数值答案（“1 other match”）。因此符合“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”分类：认识到歧义且在缺乏进一步信息时进行推测并返回确定答案。
